description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named vs2019 that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three Windows VS2019 jobs: one with STL and debug, one without STL and debug, and one with STL, debug, and forced C++03. Each job checks out the repository with submodules, adds msbuild to PATH, builds with cmake and MSBuild, and runs etl_tests.exe.
